title: Non-school alternative provision: voluntary national standards
body: "This document sets out DfE’s non-statutory national standards and accompanying guidance for non-school alternative provision.  The standards are intended to:   inform the local oversight and commissioning of non-school alternative provision set clear and consistent requirements for providers   Until the standards become mandatory, the government and DfE encourages local authorities to adopt them voluntarily to support and improve current practice.  "

taxons.title: Alternative provision and pupil referral units
